pages.raw_text:
Who will control the next coun,
Gil? Have you not heard that ques-
ton asked many times in the last
few weeks? What a world of in
fanny and disgrace is embodied in
that question. What an insinuation
of an absense of rectitude in the
conduct of the servants of the peo-
pie.


What right has any individual or
corporation to control the city coun-
Gil? None. They are sworn to be
and should be servants of the peo-
pie.


What interest is supposed to con.
troll the council now? The Wash.
ington Water Power company. The
question is intended to ask, will
that company continue it's control
or will the Traction company own
the next legislative body of this
city?


These questions grow out Of the
granting of rights on the city's
streets without a recompense tc
the city. When the city council
puts reasonable price upon fran
chises, these slurs upon the honesty
Of that body will cease.
